queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation of savings account balances below 100 DM as a determinant of elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the association between negative checking account balances and decreased credit risk exposure.
